name: Basic Bread Machine Recipe
recipeInstructions:
1. In the bread machine pan, combine yeast and malt with several ounces of water. Use a thermometer to ensure the water temperature is between 110°F and 120°F; too hot will kill the yeast.
2. The yeast should begin to bubble and multiply (proof) after about five minutes.
3. In a separate bowl, mix together all dry ingredients: whole wheat flour, unbleached white flour, salt, gluten, sugar (honey, molasses, or malt powder for sweet breads), and optional seeds like caraway or sesame seeds.
4. If the dough is too dry, add water gradually until it forms one large mass; avoid having several distinct pieces.
5. Pour the mixed dough into the bread machine pan and start the machine. Observe how the dough looks when it finishes baking. Adjust consistency if needed by adding more flour or liquid as required.
6. For sweet breads, add additional sugar (honey, molasses, or malt powder) and optional ingredients like raisins. If using mashed bananas, reduce the water slightly to compensate.
